danger_signals.visual_form: Stacked blocks filling player grid from bottom
danger_signals.meaning: Opponent chain damage incoming; game state becoming critical

danger_signals.visual_form: Play field blocks approaching top boundary
danger_signals.meaning: Imminent loss condition; player must clear blocks or lose

danger_signals.visual_form: Visual chain multiplier display during opponent attacks
danger_signals.meaning: Opponent executing combos; escalating threat level

safety_signals.visual_form: Empty or sparse blocks in player field
safety_signals.meaning: Safe state; room to maneuver and build chains

safety_signals.visual_form: Incoming Puyo pairs can be positioned flexibly
safety_signals.meaning: Player has strategic control; no immediate pressure

safety_signals.visual_form: Matching colored blocks disappearing with visual effect
safety_signals.meaning: Player gaining momentum; sending garbage to opponent

faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Appears as player character in story mode; positioned against 12 sequential opponents

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Final boss encounter after defeating 11 prior opponents
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Represents overarching threat; world conquest objective frames narrative

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Various characters with distinct visual identities
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Rulue (love interest of Dark Prince); others engage Arle for personal reasons
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Sequential boss lineup; mostly non-aligned with Dark Prince's agenda

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Arle positioned as hero; story progression through opponent elimination
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Opponents challenge Arle; each defeat weakens Dark Prince's position

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Opponent grid overflow; blocks exceed boundary
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Opponent loses control; game ends with player advancing story

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Player grid fills to top; piece cannot be placed
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Game over state; return to opponent selection or restart

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Garbage blocks rising in player field; grid density increasing
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player forced to chain faster; strategic options narrowing

environmental_storytelling.example: Sequence of 12 named opponents before Dark Prince boss indicates hierarchical threat structure; Rulue's unique position (in love with Dark Prince) suggests political/emotional complexity
Story mode positions Arle against fixed sequence; world-saving objective frames puzzle matches as conflict resolution
Each opponent presented as distinct visual character; communicates diverse world populated by individuals rather than faceless enemies

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Battles through 12 opponents sequentially; driven by world-saving objective; 16-year-old spellcaster positioning suggests youth heroism narrative
Encountered only after all 12 preliminary opponents defeated; represents apex threat; world domination agenda
Unique among opponents; personally motivated by love for Dark Prince rather than independent agenda; represents emotional stake in narrative
Challenge Arle for personal reasons ('shenanigans'); not directly aligned with Dark Prince; less ideological opposition
Garbage blocks sent to opponent reflect chain success; visual manifestation of combat pressure; clearing behavior communicates player agency

notes: Puyo Puyo (1992 Genesis) operates as narrative puzzle game: visual communication occurs primarily through character roster, story progression structure, and block accumulation mechanics. Danger/safety communicated through grid state rather than environmental visuals. Faction structure is simple (hero vs. antagonist + supporting cast) with minimal visual differentiation beyond character sprites. World state tied to puzzle match outcomes; no dynamic environmental changes documented. Political situation (Dark Prince's world domination attempt) provides narrative context but doesn't mechanically alter gameplay visuals. Game emphasizes character personality and roster variety over environmental storytelling.
